_meta.title: Synthetic EPP Command Metrics Configuration
_meta.description: Synthetic EPP data config. Defines normal behavior only.
logic: Baseline values define normal ranges per command.
Randomness adds ±5% noise to simulate natural variation.
Hourly rules represent contextual normal behavior (not anomalies).
Any deviation outside this config should be treated as anomaly.

ADD-DOMAIN._meta: Low latency write operation with moderate volume

CHECK-DOMAIN._meta: High volume read operation with very low latency

MOD-DOMAIN._meta: Heavy operation with highest volume and latency

DEL-DOMAIN._meta: Moderate volume delete operation with stable latency

hourly_rules_meta.description: Contextual behavior overrides by hour (still normal behavior).
logic: Multipliers adjust baseline values for specific hours.
Used to simulate expected spikes or load patterns.
These should NOT be treated as anomalies.

14._meta: Extreme traffic spike scenario (still considered normal context)
